sections.title: Acknowledgement
sections.html:
I acknowledge that I have received my copy of the MH Construction, Inc. Employee Handbook. I understand that it is my responsibility to read and comply with the policies contained in the handbook and any revisions made to it. I understand that this handbook is a general guide and is not a contract of employment, and that MH Construction, Inc. may change, amend, or discontinue any policy at any time, with or without notice.

Return this form to the office and keep your handbook for future reference.
